name: jest-unrs-segfault-repro
description: Minimal reproduction of SIGSEGV in V8 Sparkplug triggered by unrs-resolver NAPI churn under Jest

scripts.postinstall: node patch-jest-resolve.js && node generate-tests.js && node warm-cache.js
scripts.test:crash:loop: for i in $(seq 1 50); do echo "=== attempt $i ==="; node --no-maglev --max-old-space-size=256 ./node_modules/.bin/jest || { echo '*** CRASHED on attempt '$i' ***'; exit 1; }; done; echo 'No crash after 50 attempts'
scripts.test:crash:detect:loop: for i in $(seq 1 50); do echo "=== attempt $i ==="; node --no-maglev --max-old-space-size=256 ./node_modules/.bin/jest --detectOpenHandles --maxWorkers=1 || { echo '*** CRASHED on attempt '$i' ***'; exit 1; }; done; echo 'No crash after 50 attempts'
scripts.standalone:loop: for i in $(seq 1 50); do echo "=== attempt $i ==="; node --no-maglev --max-old-space-size=128 standalone-repro.js || { echo '*** CRASHED on attempt '$i' ***'; exit 1; }; done
